CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Deft Hank Maguire'S Responses To Pltf'S First Set Of Requests For Production Nos. 3 And 4, And To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories No. 28
Off Calendar Feb-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances were made. Tentative ruling was adopted as follows: Plaintiff Jane Doe's motion to compel responses to special interrogatory #28 and request for production of documents #3 and 4 is granted. Defendant is to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant may redact portions of any estate planning documents that do not refer to the plaintiff or her mother. Any documents withheld pursuant to a claim of privilege shall be identified with particularity in a privilege log. Judge: Bruce Chan. Not reported. (610/BEC)
